subject: Ancestry test kits
body:
Dear Jeffery 
I have ordered 30 Ancestry test kits for Shaikh Mohammed I asked them to ship it to your house 9 e 71 street it will arrive in two days as soon as it arrives I will ask Emirates airlines to collect it from your house I hope you are ok with this 
Thank you 
Sultan 

Sent from my iPhone
